name: rl-policy-runner
description: Run a trained RL policy on a robot: loads an ONNX policy, builds observations from the robot's DDS state, runs inference at a fixed control rate, and applies clamped actions — with an independent safety watchdog, an ENABLE gate, and a start/stop/E-STOP web UI. Defaults target a Unitree Go2 (high-level velocity control); edit the observation/action adapters to match your policy.

variables.name: WEB_PORT
variables.description: Port for the runner dashboard (start/stop/E-STOP + live status)

variables.name: POLICY_URL
variables.description: URL to the trained ONNX policy (downloaded on first start). Leave blank to mount one at /policy/policy.onnx instead.

variables.name: OBS_DIM
variables.description: Observation vector size your policy expects (must match training)

variables.name: ACT_DIM
variables.description: Action vector size your policy outputs

variables.name: CONTROL_MODE
variables.description: How actions reach the robot: 'lowcmd' (direct joint position targets — for Isaac Lab locomotion policies; needs sport_mode OFF) or 'velocity' (high-level SportClient, for velocity-command policies)

variables.name: ROBOT
variables.description: Target robot for the default adapters (go2 or g1)

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Robot controller IP on the robot LAN

variables.name: GO2_DDS_ADDRESS
variables.description: This device's own IP on the robot LAN that CycloneDDS binds to (the onboard Jetson is normally 192.168.123.18). Must be non-empty.
